sdapi_pages.title: Sports DataCricket API Index and User Guide
headings: Sports DataCricket API Index and User Guide
tables: http is the default request type; https is also available.
Request domain to access the Sports Data API. For most clients, this is the default: api.performfeeds.com Use the defaul
Resource of the Sports Data API. In this case, the Cricket API: cricketdata
Feed name of the resource, in the case of the Cricket API. For example: standings
Outlet Authentication Key . A unique 26-character alphanumeric UUID which is unique to each outlet. Any requests made wi
Query parameters . There are required and optional parameters. Optional parameters can help you to search the feed and c
Tournament Calendars (OT2) Tournament Calendars (OT2) Get basic information about the tournament calendars - the individ
Fixtures and Results (MA1) Fixtures and Results (MA1) Get a detailed fixture list including match details such as date,
Scorecard (MA2) Scorecard (MA2) Get detailed information about contesting teams, scores, innings, and key match data
Match Events (MA3) Match Events (MA3) Get all events in a game - including the player, team, event, type, time (minute a
Match Predicitions (MA4) Match Predicitions (MA4) Get Pre Game and Live Game Predictions for a Cricket Fixture
Match Live Score (MA5) Match Live Score (MA5) Get low latent fast information about basic scores during a live match
Commentary (MA6) Commentary (MA6) Get detailed information about cricket commentary feed

coverage_tiers.title: Sports DataCricket API - Coverage Tiers and Types
tables: Delivers the lineup player names per match.
Batsmen, runs, balls faced, fours and sixes, fall of wickets, bowlers, overs, maidens, runs conceded, wickets, dismissal type.
Length, shot type, batting connection, runs and dismissal.
Length and line, ball details, batting connection, shot type, foot movement, fielder and fielding actions, runs and dismissals and manual commentary.
Live Basic Ball by Ball Details
In-office collection Manual commentary on every ball Batsman/Bowler/Runs Scored
Live Basic Ball by Ball Details
In-ground collection Ball by Ball. Fewer updates on each ball (e.g. length, runs, shot type etc.)
Unique ID related to the analysis level of each competition or match
The collection level name related to the unique ID above denoting the analysis level for that competition or match. Note : The scorecard is produced post match
0 - unknown 1 - All Balls, All Details 2 - Scorecard 3 - All Balls, Reduced Details
